title: Decompose into Subtasks
description: Break a large task into independent, parallelizable units.
content:
Break this large task into subtasks: {{task}}

For each subtask: a clear definition of done, its dependencies on other subtasks, and whether it can run in parallel. Identify which subtasks are on the critical path and which are independent. Produce a dependency-ordered plan. Flag any subtask that's underspecified and needs clarification before work starts.
